title: Marlow's Crystal Optimizer
description: Optimization that fixes waiting on the server after crystal break before end crystal entities are cleaned.
body:
Marlow's Crystal Optimizer



Showcase Video

[![Showcase Video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/CcFT5KuQoZk/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CcFT5KuQoZk)
## Overview Marlow's Crystal Optimizer is a mod that optimizes the handling of using end crystals by removing the crystal client side, instead of waiting for the server to remove it. This can especially be useful when you are on higher ping. ## Table of Contents - [Overview](#overview) - [Supported Platforms & Versions](#supported-platforms--versions) - [License](#license) ## Supported Platforms & Versions | Platform | Supported Versions | |----------|--------------------| | Fabric | 1.19 - 26.2 | ## License This project is licensed under the [MIT License](LICENSE).
